examples.title: Pseudocode: Blockchain Features
examples.description: Demonstrates core features of blockchain technology
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the core features of blockchain technology, including decentralization, immutability, transparency, security, consensus mechanisms, and distributed ledger architecture.

examples.title: Python: Blockchain Implementation
examples.description: A basic blockchain implementation in Python
examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates a basic blockchain with blocks containing an index, previous hash, timestamp, and data. The blockchain class manages the chain of blocks and provides methods for adding new blocks.

examples.title: Java: Blockchain Implementation
examples.description: A basic blockchain implementation in Java
examples.explanation: This Java implementation demonstrates a basic blockchain with blocks containing an index, previous hash, timestamp, and data. The blockchain class manages the chain of blocks and provides methods for adding new blocks.
